name: Pizza Bites
recipeIngredient: 24 slices pepperoni, each about 1 1/2 inches in diameter
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the margarine and garlic; spread on muffin halves.
2. Cut each muffin half into 4 wedges; do not separate them.
3. Place 1 slice of pepperoni and 1 tomato half on each muffin wedge.
4. Place in a broiler pan with the top about 5 inches from the heat.
5. Mix the cheese and oregano; sprinkle over the muffin wedges.
6. Set oven control to broil or 550°F, then broil the muffin wedges until the cheese is melted, about 2 minutes.
7. Cut into wedges. (Serves 6)
